name: docs-env
description: typedoc environment. typedoc drives the JS TypeScript compiler API, which the root typescript (the native 7.x compiler) no longer ships; this file: package makes npm nest typedoc together with its own typescript 6.0.x under tools/docs/node_modules, leaving the root toolchain on 7.x. Installed by the ordinary root npm ci; the root `npm run docs` script calls the nested typedoc bin.
